page_metadata.biotools__summary: PGAP (pan-genome analysis pipeline) can perform five analytic functions with only one command, including cluster analysis of functional genes, pan-genome profile analysis, genetic variation analysis of functional genes, species evolution analysis and function enrichment analysis of gene clusters.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PGAP (pan-genome analysis pipeline) can perform five analytic functions with only one command, including cluster analysis of functional genes, pan-genome profile analysis, genetic variation analysis of functional genes, species evolution analysis and function enrichment analysis of gene clusters.
